# value

**Instance Property**

A constant value for the parameter definition.

## Declaration

```swift
var value: Any { get }
```

## Discussion

Set this value using a subclass initializer. For example, see [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEStringMetaParameterDefinition/init(value:)].
